content:
<1>This {{aiProvider}} is currently set as the default.</1>
 Deleting it will revoke access for all users, and its settings will be permanently erased.
 Another provider will be set as default automatically and can be changed later in settings.

comment.text: This text appears in a confirmation dialog when a user attempts to delete an AI provider that is currently set as the default. It warns that deleting the default provider will remove access for all users and permanently erase its settings, and that a new default provider will be automatically selected. Translators should note that "AIProvider" is a placeholder for the specific AI provider name.
